targets.rawSql:
WITH
  [
    'permissiondenied',
    'validationerror:',
    'django.http.response.http404',
    'you do not have permission to perform this action.',
    'limitreachedexception:',
    'throttled',
    'request failed with status code 429',
    'matches the given query.',
    'cloud storage instance was deleted',
    'cvatdatasetnotfounderror',
    'authenticationfailed',
    'no media data found',
    'authentication credentials were not provided',
    'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header',
    'rest_framework.exceptions.methodnotallowed',
    'rest_framework.exceptions.notfound'
  ] AS raw_excluded_patterns,
raw AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    source,
    user_id,
    lowerUTF8(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message')) AS msg_lower
  FROM cvat.events
  PREWHERE scope = 'send:exception'
    AND source IN (${sources})
    AND timestamp >= subtractSeconds($__fromTime, dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime))
    AND timestamp <= $__toTime
  WHERE NOT multiSearchAnyCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), raw_excluded_patterns)
), filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    source,
    user_id,
    toUInt8(timestamp >= $__fromTime) AS period_id,
    if(timestamp >= $__fromTime, toStartOfDay(timestamp), toDateTime('1970-01-01 00:00:00', 'Etc/UTC')) AS day,
    msg_lower
  FROM raw
  WHERE length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM msg_lower)) > 0
), categorized AS (
  SELECT
    period_id,
    day,
    source,
    user_id,
    multiIf(
      position(msg_lower, 'network error') > 0, toUInt8(1),
      position(msg_lower, 'bad gateway') > 0, toUInt8(2),
      position(msg_lower, 'cvat.apps.webhooks.exceptions.webhookdeliveryerror') > 0, toUInt8(40),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['gateway time-out', 'gateway timeout', '504 gateway', 'code 504 received', 'timeout exceeded', 'request aborted', 'the request timed out. the cvat server did not respond in time']), toUInt8(3),
      position(msg_lower, 'server error') > 0, toUInt8(4),
      position(msg_lower, 'no available server') > 0, toUInt8(5),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['redis.exceptions', 'kvrocks']), toUInt8(6),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['django.db.utils.operationalerror', 'database system is']), toUInt8(7),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['integrityerror', 'foreign key constraint', 'unique constraint']), toUInt8(8),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['rq.timeouts.jobtimeoutexception', 'takes too long chunks']), toUInt8(9),
      source = 'client' AND multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['cannot read properties of', 'can''t access property', 'objectstate must be provided correct label, got wrong value undefined', 'cannot set properties of undefined']), toUInt8(10),
      source = 'client' AND multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['is not a function', 'is not iterable']), toUInt8(11),
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'setting getter-only property') > 0, toUInt8(12),
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'the start frame is out of the job') > 0, toUInt8(13),
      source = 'client' AND multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['canvas', 'webgl', 'createimagebitmap', 'createobjecturl', 'getimagedata']), toUInt8(14),
      source = 'client' AND multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['react error', '__reactfiber']), toUInt8(15),
      source = 'client' AND (startsWith(msg_lower, '**shapes**') OR startsWith(msg_lower, '**labels**')), toUInt8(16),
      source = 'client' AND multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['queryselector', 'not a valid selector']), toUInt8(17),
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'session has not been initialized yet. call annotations.get() or annotations.clear({ reload: true }) before') > 0, toUInt8(18),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['reached the maximum number of projects', 'cachetoolargedataerror']), toUInt8(19),
      position(msg_lower, 'decompressionbomberror') > 0, toUInt8(20),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['polygon must have at least', 'all the objects must have the same label', 'expected only one visible shape per frame', 'cannot join: not enough valid polygons']), toUInt8(21),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['action name must be unique', 'all label names must be unique']), toUInt8(22),
      position(msg_lower, 'label') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'is not registered for this task') > 0, toUInt8(23),
      (position(msg_lower, 'trying to save an attribute') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'invalid value') > 0) OR (position(msg_lower, 'spec_id') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, ' is invalid') > 0), toUInt8(24),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['unsupported media type', 'unknown media type', 'file must be file instance']), toUInt8(25),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['unexpected type of track', 'skeleton template must be specified', 'tried to set wrong number of points for a skeleton', 'cannot join these polygons: the operation would create a shape with holes, which is not supported by cvat. please select different polygons or use the mask tool.']), toUInt8(21),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['oserror: [errno 36]', 'oserror: [errno 22] invalid argument']), toUInt8(26),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['datumaro.components.errors', 'annotationexporterror', 'itemexporterror', 'repeateditemerror', 'datumaro.components.contexts.importer._importfail', 'there is no item named ''project.json'' in the archive', 'there is no item named ''task.json'' in the archive', 'no media data found', 'no image found', 'cvat.apps.dataset_manager.bindings.cvatimporterror']), toUInt8(29),
      position(msg_lower, 'cloudstoragemissingerror') > 0, toUInt8(30),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['invalidimageerror', 'unidentifiedimageerror']), toUInt8(31),
      position(msg_lower, 'runtimeerror: exception occurred during compression of image') > 0, toUInt8(32),
      position(msg_lower, 'av.error') > 0, toUInt8(33),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['filenotfounderror: [errno 2] no such file or directory', 'manifest.jsonl']), toUInt8(34),
      multiSearchAny(msg_lower, ['not found on the cloud storage', 'resource ali-']), toUInt8(35),
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to use undefined cloud storage') > 0, toUInt8(36),
      position(msg_lower, 'already being processed (action=') > 0, toUInt8(37),
      position(msg_lower, 'duplicate key value violates unique constraint') > 0, toUInt8(38),
      position(msg_lower, 'locknotownederror') > 0, toUInt8(39),
      toUInt8(255)
    ) AS category_id
  FROM filtered
), grouped AS (
  SELECT
    grouping(period_id) AS g_period,
    grouping(day) AS g_day,
    grouping(source) AS g_source,
    grouping(category_id) AS g_category,
    period_id,
    day,
    source,
    category_id,
    count() AS error_count,
    uniqExactIf(user_id, isNotNull(user_id)) AS unique_users
  FROM categorized
  GROUP BY GROUPING SETS (
    (period_id),
    (period_id, source),
    (period_id, category_id),
    (period_id, source, category_id),
    (day, category_id)
  )
)
SELECT
  dataset,
  period,
  time,
  source,
  category,
  category_order,
  error_count,
  unique_users,
  if(dataset IN ('category', 'source_category') AND period = 'current', round(error_count * 100.0 / sumIf(error_count, period = 'current') OVER (PARTITION BY dataset), 2), NULL) AS percentage,
  if(dataset IN ('stats', 'source', 'category', 'source_category'), sumIf(error_count, period = 'previous') OVER (PARTITION BY dataset, source, category), NULL) AS prev_error_count,
  if(dataset IN ('stats', 'source', 'category', 'source_category'), sumIf(unique_users, period = 'previous') OVER (PARTITION BY dataset, source, category), NULL) AS prev_unique_users,
  if(dataset IN ('stats', 'source', 'category', 'source_category') AND period = 'current' AND prev_error_count != 0, round((error_count - prev_error_count) * 100.0 / prev_error_count, 2), NULL) AS delta_percent,
  if(dataset = 'stats' AND period = 'current' AND prev_unique_users != 0, round((unique_users - prev_unique_users) * 100.0 / prev_unique_users, 2), NULL) AS unique_users_delta_percent
FROM
(
  SELECT
    multiIf(
      g_period = 0 AND g_day = 1 AND g_source = 1 AND g_category = 1, 'stats',
      g_period = 0 AND g_day = 1 AND g_source = 0 AND g_category = 1, 'source',
      g_period = 0 AND g_day = 1 AND g_source = 1 AND g_category = 0, 'category',
      g_period = 0 AND g_day = 1 AND g_source = 0 AND g_category = 0, 'source_category',
      g_period = 1 AND g_day = 0 AND g_source = 1 AND g_category = 0, 'day_category',
      'unknown'
    ) AS dataset,
    if(g_period = 0, if(period_id = 1, 'current', 'previous'), '') AS period,
    day AS time,
    source,
    if(g_category = 0, multiIf(
      category_id = 1, 'Network Error',
      category_id = 2, '502 Bad Gateway',
      category_id = 3, '504 Gateway Timeout',
      category_id = 4, '500 Server Error',
      category_id = 5, 'No available server / service unavailable',
      category_id = 6, 'Redis / kvrocks',
      category_id = 7, 'Postgres / DB (operational)',
      category_id = 8, 'Postgres / DB (integrity)',
      category_id = 9, 'Timeouts / background jobs',
      category_id = 10, 'JS null/undefined access',
      category_id = 11, 'JS type/method errors',
      category_id = 12, 'JS read-only property assignment',
      category_id = 13, 'Client validation / frame bounds',
      category_id = 14, 'Canvas / WebGL / memory',
      category_id = 15, 'React / DOM',
      category_id = 16, 'Debug logging / shapes dump',
      category_id = 17, 'JS DOM API / Selectors',
      category_id = 18, 'CVAT-core / Business Logic',
      category_id = 19, 'Quotas / size limits',
      category_id = 20, 'Quotas / size limits (image bomb)',
      category_id = 21, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      category_id = 22, 'Uniqueness / names / ids',
      category_id = 23, 'Labels not registered',
      category_id = 24, 'Attributes invalid value',
      category_id = 25, 'Unsupported / invalid input',
      category_id = 26, 'OS error / file system',
      category_id = 29, 'Import/Export / Datumaro',
      category_id = 30, 'Cloud storage / file missing',
      category_id = 31, 'Invalid image file',
      category_id = 32, 'Image compression errors',
      category_id = 33, 'AV / codec errors',
      category_id = 34, 'File not found / missing file',
      category_id = 35, 'Cloud storage / file not found',
      category_id = 36, 'Cloud storage / config error',
      category_id = 37, 'Concurrent export/import / duplicate request',
      category_id = 38, 'DB duplicate key',
      category_id = 39, 'Redis lock / concurrency',
      category_id = 40, 'Webhook delivery errors',
      'Other / uncategorized'
    ), '') AS category,
    if(g_category = 0, multiIf(
      category_id = 7, 1,
      category_id = 10, 2,
      category_id = 34, 3,
      category_id = 33, 4,
      category_id = 30, 5,
      category_id = 21, 6,
      category_id = 20, 8,
      category_id = 31, 9,
      category_id = 19, 10,
      category_id = 16, 11,
      category_id = 8, 12,
      category_id = 15, 13,
      category_id = 18, 14,
      category_id = 3, 15,
      category_id = 37, 16,
      category_id = 14, 17,
      category_id = 13, 18,
      category_id = 22, 19,
      category_id = 11, 21,
      category_id = 1, 22,
      category_id = 23, 23,
      category_id = 4, 24,
      category_id = 255, 25,
      category_id = 25, 26,
      category_id = 29, 27,
      category_id = 2, 28,
      1000 + category_id
    ), 0) AS category_order,
    error_count,
    unique_users
  FROM grouped
  WHERE NOT (g_period = 1 AND g_day = 0 AND day = toDateTime('1970-01-01 00:00:00', 'Etc/UTC'))
)

WITH
  [
    'permissiondenied',
    'validationerror:',
    'django.http.response.http404',
    'you do not have permission to perform this action.',
    'limitreachedexception:',
    'throttled',
    'request failed with status code 429',
    'matches the given query.',
    'cloud storage instance was deleted',
    'cvatdatasetnotfounderror',
    'authenticationfailed',
    'no media data found',
    'authentication credentials were not provided',
    'rest_framework.exceptions.notacceptable: could not satisfy the request accept header',
    'rest_framework.exceptions.methodnotallowed',
    'rest_framework.exceptions.notfound'
  ] AS raw_excluded_patterns,
raw AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    user_id,
    lowerUTF8(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message')) AS msg_lower
  FROM cvat.events
  PREWHERE scope = 'send:exception'
    AND source IN (${sources})
    AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  WHERE NOT multiSearchAnyCaseInsensitive(JSONExtractString(payload, 'message'), raw_excluded_patterns)
), filtered AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    user_id,
    msg_lower
  FROM raw
  WHERE length(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM msg_lower)) > 0
), categorized AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    user_id,
    msg_lower,
    multiIf(
      position(msg_lower, 'network error') > 0, 'Network Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'bad gateway') > 0, '502 Bad Gateway',
      position(msg_lower, 'cvat.apps.webhooks.exceptions.webhookdeliveryerror') > 0, 'Webhook delivery errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'gateway time-out') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'gateway timeout') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '504 gateway') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'code 504 received') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'timeout exceeded') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'request aborted') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'the request timed out. the cvat server did not respond in time') > 0, '504 Gateway Timeout',
      position(msg_lower, 'server error') > 0, '500 Server Error',
      position(msg_lower, 'no available server') > 0, 'No available server / service unavailable',
      position(msg_lower, 'redis.exceptions') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'kvrocks') > 0, 'Redis / kvrocks',
      position(msg_lower, 'django.db.utils.operationalerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'database system is') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (operational)',
      position(msg_lower, 'integrityerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'foreign key constraint') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unique constraint') > 0, 'Postgres / DB (integrity)',
      position(msg_lower, 'rq.timeouts.jobtimeoutexception') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'takes too long chunks') > 0, 'Timeouts / background jobs',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'cannot read properties of') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'can''t access property') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'objectstate must be provided correct label, got wrong value undefined') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot set properties of undefined') > 0), 'JS null/undefined access',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'is not a function') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'is not iterable') > 0), 'JS type/method errors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'setting getter-only property') > 0, 'JS read-only property assignment',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'the start frame is out of the job') > 0, 'Client validation / frame bounds',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'canvas') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'webgl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createimagebitmap') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'createobjecturl') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'getimagedata') > 0), 'Canvas / WebGL / memory',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'react error') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, '__reactfiber') > 0), 'React / DOM',
      source = 'client' AND (startsWith(msg_lower, '**shapes**') OR startsWith(msg_lower, '**labels**')), 'Debug logging / shapes dump',
      source = 'client' AND (position(msg_lower, 'queryselector') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'not a valid selector') > 0), 'JS DOM API / Selectors',
      source = 'client' AND position(msg_lower, 'session has not been initialized yet. call annotations.get() or annotations.clear({ reload: true }) before') > 0, 'CVAT-core / Business Logic',
      position(msg_lower, 'reached the maximum number of projects') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cachetoolargedataerror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits',
      position(msg_lower, 'decompressionbomberror') > 0, 'Quotas / size limits (image bomb)',
      position(msg_lower, 'polygon must have at least') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all the objects must have the same label') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'expected only one visible shape per frame') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot join: not enough valid polygons') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'action name must be unique') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'all label names must be unique') > 0, 'Uniqueness / names / ids',
      position(msg_lower, 'label') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'is not registered for this task') > 0, 'Labels not registered',
      (position(msg_lower, 'trying to save an attribute') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, 'invalid value') > 0) OR (position(msg_lower, 'spec_id') > 0 AND position(msg_lower, ' is invalid') > 0), 'Attributes invalid value',
      position(msg_lower, 'unsupported media type') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unknown media type') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'file must be file instance') > 0, 'Unsupported / invalid input',
      position(msg_lower, 'unexpected type of track') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'skeleton template must be specified') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'tried to set wrong number of points for a skeleton') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cannot join these polygons: the operation would create a shape with holes, which is not supported by cvat. please select different polygons or use the mask tool.') > 0, 'Geometry / annotation rules',
      position(msg_lower, 'oserror: [errno 36]') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'oserror: [errno 22] invalid argument') > 0, 'OS error / file system',
      position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.errors') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'annotationexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'itemexporterror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'repeateditemerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'datumaro.components.contexts.importer._importfail') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''project.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'there is no item named ''task.json'' in the archive') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no media data found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'no image found') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'cvat.apps.dataset_manager.bindings.cvatimporterror') > 0, 'Import/Export / Datumaro',
      position(msg_lower, 'cloudstoragemissingerror') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file missing',
      position(msg_lower, 'invalidimageerror') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'unidentifiedimageerror') > 0, 'Invalid image file',
      position(msg_lower, 'runtimeerror: exception occurred during compression of image') > 0, 'Image compression errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'av.error') > 0, 'AV / codec errors',
      position(msg_lower, 'filenotfounderror: [errno 2] no such file or directory') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'manifest.jsonl') > 0, 'File not found / missing file',
      position(msg_lower, 'not found on the cloud storage') > 0 OR position(msg_lower, 'resource ali-') > 0, 'Cloud storage / file not found',
      position(msg_lower, 'trying to use undefined cloud storage') > 0, 'Cloud storage / config error',
      position(msg_lower, 'already being processed (action=') > 0, 'Concurrent export/import / duplicate request',
      position(msg_lower, 'duplicate key value violates unique constraint') > 0, 'DB duplicate key',
      position(msg_lower, 'locknotownederror') > 0, 'Redis lock / concurrency',
      'Other / uncategorized'
    ) AS category
  FROM filtered
)
SELECT
  category,
  msg_lower AS error,
  source,
  count() AS error_count,
  uniqExactIf(user_id, isNotNull(user_id)) AS unique_users
FROM categorized
WHERE '${category}' = '__all' OR category = '${category}'
GROUP BY category, msg_lower, source
ORDER BY error_count DESC, category ASC, error ASC, source ASC
LIMIT 200

list.label: Category
list.name: category
list.query: Network Error,JS null/undefined access,500 Server Error,502 Bad Gateway,504 Gateway Timeout,Other / uncategorized,AV / codec errors,Attributes invalid value,CVAT-core / Business Logic,Canvas / WebGL / memory,Cloud storage / config error,Cloud storage / file missing,Cloud storage / file not found,Concurrent export/import / duplicate request,DB duplicate key,Debug logging / shapes dump,File not found / missing file,Geometry / annotation rules,Image compression errors,Import/Export / Datumaro,Invalid image file,JS DOM API / Selectors,JS type/method errors,Labels not registered,No available server / service unavailable,OS error / file system,Postgres / DB (integrity),Postgres / DB (operational),Quotas / size limits,Quotas / size limits (image bomb),React / DOM,Redis / kvrocks,Redis lock / concurrency,Timeouts / background jobs,Uniqueness / names / ids,Unsupported / invalid input,Webhook delivery errors,JS read-only property assignment,Client validation / frame bounds
list.definition: Network Error,JS null/undefined access,500 Server Error,502 Bad Gateway,504 Gateway Timeout,Other / uncategorized,AV / codec errors,Attributes invalid value,CVAT-core / Business Logic,Canvas / WebGL / memory,Cloud storage / config error,Cloud storage / file missing,Cloud storage / file not found,Concurrent export/import / duplicate request,DB duplicate key,Debug logging / shapes dump,File not found / missing file,Geometry / annotation rules,Image compression errors,Import/Export / Datumaro,Invalid image file,JS DOM API / Selectors,JS type/method errors,Labels not registered,No available server / service unavailable,OS error / file system,Postgres / DB (integrity),Postgres / DB (operational),Quotas / size limits,Quotas / size limits (image bomb),React / DOM,Redis / kvrocks,Redis lock / concurrency,Timeouts / background jobs,Uniqueness / names / ids,Unsupported / invalid input,Webhook delivery errors,JS read-only property assignment,Client validation / frame bounds
